# PuSegmentedItem

## Intent

- segmented item
- single-choice option
- view mode option

## Prefer When

- Use inside PuSegmented for each selectable option.

## Avoid When

- Avoid standalone usage because selection state and keyboard behavior come from PuSegmented.

## Import

```ts
import { PuSegmentedItem } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```
